creator: samath@slt.lk
text:
Dear Sir,

I am waiting for till you solve the Above problem. I am using FreeBSD on
PC with 486DX CPU. Can this bug be there only on m/c's not running on a
Pentium Processor.

If I compile the sysinstall on my m/c this may be solved. But my problem
is where can I find the source of the sysinstall. What config line
should I have in the cvsup etc. Or at least if I can find the sysinstall
- binary on your ftp site (which does not have this problem) , it is
very much helpful. 

I am so used to sysinstall to add packages, and with out it the life is
too hard !


Thanks in advance !

- Samath
Sri Lanka Telecom
